title: Asoteria
description: Explore an astrology based dimension with new gems, biomes, entities, and structures. Discover the latent history and secrets of this vast realm.
body:
![Version 2.0 banner](https://64.media.tumblr.com/8ecef75f4740b10fab10fa546c4ed36b/f21681855b9dd17a-0f/s2048x3072/813973153dd1f9edbe5b7231486dba76bb3b1b4e.pnj)

The Asoteria is an astrology based dimension with new gems, biomes, entities, and structures. Discover the latent history and secrets of this vast realm.

## How to Enter Dimension
![Drawn Instructions for Entering Dimension](https://64.media.tumblr.com/8bf449e88c58630489e5150b5160fd7a/e78194cedb711d7f-a8/s640x960/ad5550eb15633c70c45556a678012216937b1c70.pnj)

Use the Gilded Eyes to fuel the portal structures found across all dimensions and gain access to Asoteria. A nether star is used on the central portal block to open the gateway.

## Contraband Portal
![Recipe for Contraband Lighter](https://64.media.tumblr.com/6090c4d2ca8e7a2aa0df7cde147002ff/ad8fd093085cf3c9-71/s1280x1920/2dd47ff95e0e3850d46c46c61337deb3b34fafb4.pnj)

A Contraband Lighter can be crafted from all 12 gems and a piece of iron to light a portal which transports non player entities to and from the dimension.

## Current Additions
![Development Sketches of Dimension Features](https://64.media.tumblr.com/04e69f30667ffcfaa8932d13205f33fb/e78194cedb711d7f-8d/s640x960/c6937f47c49a88231274ad25424046d7cd132109.pnj)

Pre-activated portals exist in Asoteria to return to the surface, but they will eventually run out of fuel. 12 unique gems can be mined in the Asoteria, which can serve as a permanent source of portal fuel.


## Biomes
<details>
<summary>Nova Meadows</summary>

![The Nova Meadow page. Includes notes on the new Mallow tree and wood, 4 new plants, and new food Mallow Berry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01b7f1cc5272fc98847ca0e80dcab79440a8567e.png)

The Nova Meadow biome adds a new wood type, the Mallow tree. 4 new plant types generate here, the Chulip, Cloud Thale, Rose Hip, and Thistle Weeds. A new food grows here, the Mallow Berry, which can be turned into a delicious tea.

![The Star Bunny page. Includes notes on the new hostile and peaceful Star Bunnies](https://64.media.tumblr.com/e126a6544c42714c73a17cbe24db305c/ad8fd093085cf3c9-0b/s640x960/220144bff24548e55aa6bcef486bfd3d7a67eb69.pnj)

The Star Bunnies populate the Nova Meadows. The larger Celestial Bunnies are hostile and vigilantly watch those around them. The smaller Dust Bunnies are favorable to Mallow Berries, and adapt to the time in the Overworld when fed a Mallow Berry on the surface.

![The Moth page. Includes notes on the new hostile and peaceful moth variants](https://64.media.tumblr.com/5c0b63d76446c5342f55e61b89cc5f1b/ad8fd093085cf3c9-e5/s640x960/c09c0f805bd88ae24b45709b623ed1a9664a3de7.pnj)

Several moth variants live in the Nova Meadows. The smaller colorful moths are fully peaceful, but the larger Flare Moth will attack any player that gets too close. The Flare Moth reacts strangely to ice and cold environments.

</details>


## Future Additions
![The next update, version 3.0 for the Shattered Stand](https://64.media.tumblr.com/be559d2c0298837a469c89a3bdfe2516/ad8fd093085cf3c9-1c/s640x960/b940a22ce8e94b9a4d835ec94ec6af4b5fbc639e.pnj)

The next update will add the Shattered Stand biome, full of pink and blue vegetation, frequent rain, and small rodent and flying fish creatures. 

<hr data-mce-selected="1">

If you want to stay updated on the progress of the mod, get early access to test the beta versions, or pitch in with your own suggestions, I welcome you to join my discord The Empyr3. We also have a forum channel for feedback about the mod and a #coding-stuff channel if you have a casual question or suggestion you'd like to mention :>

~ Seer

![Empyr3 Banner](https://64.media.tumblr.com/c6a3c82db08f552caea6fbc335408cd2/dc0014a2e7c8630e-c1/s2048x3072/bfd1ffa937d23bbd937521255b701c2d4066dcea.pnj)
